Value:
Sheet Trays, resting racks, binder clips, skewers, 
Fish box
Unit: gr, Batch x1: nan, Batch x2: 0, Batch x3: 0, Batch x4: 0, Prep/Brand: Mayan Farm
Sandwich between 2 wire racks, with feet opposing outside, to maintain a flat shape during cook.
Each wire rack sandwich should have 6 tortillas.
Using Butterfly or Binder Clips to pinch racks together, use a thin skewer to dock tortillas to prevent air rising in between.
In a convection oven preheated to ~350°F, bake for ~7 minutes then rotate and bake for an additional ~1 min
Allow to cool while inbetween racks, then reserve to large fish boxes with silica gel packets.
Store in a cool, dry place and label with caution to prevent breakage.
